headline: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Set To Reclaim Key Level; Apple, SpaceX, Sandisk, Robinhood In Focus
summary: Dow Jones futures were little changed Monday morning, while S&P 500 futures and especially Nasdaq futures rose.  Apple, SpaceX, Sandisk and Robinhood Markets are notable stocks to watch.  Last week, the major indexes had solid gains, but while the Dow Jones ended at record highs, the Nasdaq fell back below key support as AI stocks were hammered.

headline: Why there's no 'offseason' travel anymore
summary: As summers are growing hotter and crowds are getting bigger, more Americans are choosing to visit international destinations in the early spring and fall. Airlines are betting on more people taking long-haul flights during shoulder seasons and are offering more international flights year-round. CNBC's Leslie Josephs has more.

raw.headline: Why there's no 'offseason' travel anymore
